id.description: Unique ID of the user form.

account.description: ID of the account associated with the user form.

income_source.description: User response entered into the `Income source` input field.

payroll_provider.description: User response entered into the `Payroll provider (optional)` input field.

created_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the user form was submitted.

updated_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the user form object was last updated.
